package.name: agv_hil_bridges
package.description: HIL-only bridge nodes. Translate the sim host's hardware-emulator topics (/agv/joint_states, IMU raw) into the standard brain-side topics (/agv/wheel_odom, /visual_slam/tracking/odometry) that agv_odrive and isaac_ros_visual_slam provide on the real robot. Used only when AGV_MODE=hil; in production this package's nodes are not launched.
